channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 f/textream (1940 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: f

📝 Repository: f/textream

📄 Descrizione: Textream is a free macOS teleprompter app for streamers, interviewers, and presenters. It highlights your script in real-time as you speak, displayed in a beautiful Dynamic Island overlay. With extensible features.

⭐ Stelle: 1940

🍴 Forks: 129

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: macos macos-app streaming

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-08T09:20:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-09T01:47:52Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 cosZone/MoePeek (416 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cosZone

📝 Repository: cosZone/MoePeek

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight macOS selection translator built with pure Swift 6, featuring on-device Apple Translate for privacy, only 5MB install size and stable ~50MB memory usage. 一款轻量级 macOS 划词翻译工具，纯 Swift 6 开发，设备端 Apple 翻译保护隐私，安装体积仅 5MB，后台运行内存稳定约 50MB

⭐ Stelle: 416

🍴 Forks: 25

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: apple macos ocr short swift

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T12:29:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-12T16:46:57Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📄 Descrizione: TVBox-Swift 是一套基于原生 Swift & SwiftUI 构建的跨平台多媒体应用核心工程。它同时支持 macOS 和 iOS 设备，致力于在双端提供无缝、现代且极其流畅的视听体验。

⭐ Stelle: 95

🍴 Forks: 14

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-01T06:00:54Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-10T13:37:59Z
